summary: Frontend testing completed for new instruction block feature. All 8 requested features verified and working correctly.
seed_data_creation: None - hardcoded PRACTICE_EXERCISES data in ChessBoard.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation flow: Welcome screen -> 'Ingresar' -> 'Alumno' -> 'Entrenar' card or 'Entrena' bottom nav -> 'Practica' card (use JS click to reliably click card container). Key data-testid attributes: instruction-block, instruction-text, chessboard-container, hint-btn, hint-text

instruction_block_visibility.details: Instruction block (data-testid='instruction-block') visible above chessboard, below exercise title

instruction_text_content.details: Level 1 Exercise 1 shows exact text: 'Toca el Rey blanco y muévelo a cualquier casilla vecina. Recuerda: solo puede avanzar un paso.'

dynamic_update_on_level_change.details: Switching from Nivel 1 to Nivel 2 updates instruction text to Alfil/Bishop content without needing Reiniciar

dynamic_update_on_exercise_change.details: Clicking 'Ejercicio 2' within Level 2 updates instruction text to Caballo/Knight content

category_badge_movimiento.details: Levels 1-2 show 'MOVIMIENTO' category with Target icon (cyan)

category_badge_captura.details: Level 3 Exercise 1 shows 'CAPTURA' category with Swords icon (yellow)

category_badge_ataque.details: Level 3 Exercise 2 shows 'ATAQUE' category with Swords icon (red)

category_badge_mate.details: Level 4 shows 'MATE' category with Crown icon (gold)

piece_badge.details: Piece badge updates correctly: Rey (L1E1), Torre (L1E2), Alfil (L2E1), Caballo (L2E2), Torre (L3E1), Reina (L3E2), Torre (L4E1)

layout_stability.details: Instruction block positioned above chessboard, no layout shifts on level/exercise changes

hint_button.details: Pista button toggles hint text correctly, shows 'Haz click en el Rey y luego en una casilla adyacente' for Level 1
